headline: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) Following Mayo Clinic Trial Tie Up Faces A Fresh Valuation Test
summary: GE HealthCare Technologies (GEHC) is back in focus after a new research collaboration with Mayo Clinic on the MI-BET theranostics trial for advanced prostate cancer, highlighting its molecular imaging and radioligand therapy capabilities. See our latest analysis for GE HealthCare Technologies. At a recent share price of US$63.20, GE HealthCare Technologies has seen the share price fall 13.66% over the past 90 days and the 1-year total shareholder return decline 16.09%, as investors reacted to...
